title: Feur Elytra Wings
body:
![Feur Elytra Wings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16cf791f24dcf8169c0b5a6f6fbee42a6ac88758.png)

_FEUR Elytra Wings_ introduces 16 new pairs of Wings to Minecraft, allowing for more variety and possibilities in flight. The choice of Wings depends on the type of wool used during crafting, making customization straightforward and intuitive.

16 wings for 16 wools, the craft here :

![Elytra craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97b6aeb320d8a51bc9d83150480dd690a6050908.png)



These new Wings aren’t just about looks: they offer improved durability and resistance compared to classic Elytra. Additionally, they can be enchanted like a chestplate, giving you better protection and the ability to explore the skies for longer with added safety.


A simple and practical mod for those who want to combine style and efficiency in their aerial adventures.
